sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48507" key="qesmodo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεσμο-δότης</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n48507.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lawgiver</tr_>, cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-θέτης</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.9</biblScope> </bibl>:—fem. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεσμο-δότειρα</orth> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orph.</author> </bibl> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Εὐχή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
